subcodes.first_line: In successive years, wondrous and transcendent Tablets have been revealed from the heaven of the Divine Will, and verses specially sent forth and dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در سنین متوالیات الواح منیعه بدیعه از سماء مشیت منزل آیات مخصوصا نازل و ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @exhortations and counsels
